page: Amazon Web Services r8idn.32xlarge is a memory-optimized, network-optimized, and EBS-optimized instance type powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features 128 virtual CPUs and 64 physical cores based on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel processors running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of dedicated system memory, translating to 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

For local storage, the r8idn.32xlarge includes 7600 GB of high-speed NVMe SSD instance store volumes. This local storage is bundled directly with the instance, providing low-latency, high-throughput data access. Additionally, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps, making it highly suitable for data-intensive applications requiring rapid network transfers and high EBS performance.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high density of memory, substantial local NVMe storage, and high-speed network interfaces position this instance as a consolidated resource pool for demanding workloads. It eliminates the need for external storage attachments for high-I/O tasks, though the lack of a GPU limits its applicability for hardware-accelerated machine learning. Appropriate workloads include large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and real-time data processing pipelines.
description: Amazon Web Services r8idn.32xlarge is a memory-optimized and network-optimized instance designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor and Intel x86_64 processors running at 3.9 GHz, this instance provides 128 vCPUs (64 physical cores) and 1024.0 GB of dedicated RAM. It features 7600 GB of bundled local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps. The high memory-to-core ratio and substantial local storage capacity make it highly efficient for workloads that require rapid data access and high-throughput networking without the need for external storage overhead. The r8idn.32xlarge is optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, real-time analytics, and high-performance enterprise applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8idn.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, 7600 GB local NVMe SSD storage, and 200 Gbps network bandwidth for demanding database workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8idn.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7600 GB local NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, massive local NVMe storage, and high-speed two-hundred gigabit network performance.
bullet_points: 128 vCPUs and 64 physical Intel cores running at 3.9 GHz
1024.0 GB of dedicated system memory (8.0 GB per core)
7600 GB of bundled local NVMe SSD instance storage
200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with Nitro hypervisor optimization
Designed for large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, and enterprise applications
